# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Apache Kafka Broker Configuration - Production Deployment
# server.properties

############################# Server Basics #############################

# The id of the broker. This must be set to a unique integer for each broker.
broker.id=1

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# The address the socket server listens on.
# Combined listener configuration for internal and external traffic
listeners=INTERNAL://0.0.0.0:9092,EXTERNAL://0.0.0.0:9093,REPLICATION://0.0.0.0:9094

# Hostname and port the broker will advertise to producers and consumers.
# Adjust hostnames to match your actual broker FQDN
advertised.listeners=INTERNAL://kafka-broker-1.internal.example.com:9092,EXTERNAL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9093,REPLICATION://kafka-broker-1.internal.example.com:9094

# Maps listener names to security protocols
listener.security.protocol.map=INTERNAL:SASL_PLAINTEXT,EXTERNAL:SASL_SSL,REPLICATION:SASL_PLAINTEXT

# Listener used for inter-broker communication
inter.broker.listener.name=REPLICATION

# The number of threads that the server uses for receiving requests from the network
num.network.threads=8

# The number of threads that the server uses for processing requests
num.io.threads=16

# The send buffer (SO_SNDBUF) used by the socket server
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400

# The receive buffer (SO_RCVBUF) used by the socket server
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400

# The maximum size of a request that the socket server will accept (protection against OOM)
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

# Maximum number of connections allowed from each ip address
# Set to 0 for unlimited
max.connections.per.ip=100

# Maximum number of queued requests allowed before blocking network threads
queued.max.requests=500

############################# SASL Authentication #############################

# SASL mechanism for inter-broker communication
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512

# Enabled SASL mechanisms
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512

############################# SSL Configuration (for EXTERNAL listener) #############################

ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker1.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=${KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.key.password=${KEY_PASSWORD}
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=${TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.client.auth=required
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https

############################# Log / Data Settings #############################

# Comma-separated list of directories for Kafka data logs
# Use multiple directories on separate physical disks for better performance
log.dirs=/var/kafka-data/logs-1,/var/kafka-data/logs-2,/var/kafka-data/logs-3

# The default number of log partitions per topic (overridden at topic creation)
num.partitions=6

# The number of threads per data directory to be used for log recovery at startup and flushing at shutdown
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

# Enable auto leader rebalancing
auto.leader.rebalance.enable=true

# Percentage of leader imbalance allowed per broker before triggering rebalance
leader.imbalance.per.broker.percentage=10

# Frequency of leader imbalance check in seconds
leader.imbalance.check.interval.seconds=300

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# Default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Minimum number of replicas that must acknowledge a write for the write to be considered successful
min.insync.replicas=2

# Number of fetcher threads used to replicate messages from a source broker
num.replica.fetchers=4

# Maximum bytes to fetch per partition for replication
replica.fetch.max.bytes=10485760

# Wait time for replica fetchers
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500

# If a follower hasn't sent any fetch requests or consumed up to the leaders log end offset
# for at least this time, the leader will remove the follower from ISR
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

# Socket timeout for replica connections
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000

# Socket receive buffer for replica connections
replica.socket.receive.buffer.bytes=65536

# Unclean leader election - DISABLED for data safety in production
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

############################# Topic Configuration Defaults #############################

# Allow auto creation of topic on the server
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Allow deleting topics
delete.topic.enable=true

# Maximum message size (1MB default, increased to 10MB)
message.max.bytes=10485760

# Compression type for a given topic
compression.type=producer

############################# Internal Topic Settings #############################

# Replication factor for the offsets topic
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3

# Number of partitions for the offsets topic
offsets.topic.num.partitions=50

# Replication factor for the transaction state log topic
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3

# Min ISR for the transaction state log topic
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

# Number of partitions for the transaction state log topic
transaction.state.log.num.partitions=50

############################# Log Flush Policy #############################

# Messages are flushed to disk based on time and count thresholds
# For production, rely on replication rather than frequent flushing
# The number of messages to accept before forcing a flush of data to disk
#log.flush.interval.messages=10000

# The maximum amount of time a message can sit in a log before we force a flush
#log.flush.interval.ms=1000

# Frequency of the check for log flushable conditions
log.flush.scheduler.interval.ms=3000

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# The minimum age of a log file to be eligible for deletion due to age
log.retention.hours=168

# A size-based retention policy for logs (per partition)
# -1 means no size limit, only time-based retention
log.retention.bytes=-1

# The maximum size of a single log segment file
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# The interval at which log segments are checked to see if they can be deleted
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

# Log cleanup policy: delete or compact
log.cleanup.policy=delete

# Enable log compaction cleaner
log.cleaner.enable=true

# Number of background threads for log compaction
log.cleaner.threads=2

# The amount of memory allocated for log deduplication across all cleaner threads
log.cleaner.dedupe.buffer.size=134217728

############################# Zookeeper Configuration #############################

# Zookeeper connection string (comma separated host:port pairs)
# Using a chroot path /kafka for namespace isolation
zookeeper.connect=zk-1.internal.example.com:2181,zk-2.internal.example.com:2181,zk-3.internal.example.com:2181/kafka

# Timeout in ms for connecting to zookeeper
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000

# Zookeeper session timeout
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Max time for zookeeper operations before failing
zookeeper.max.in.flight.requests=10

# Enable zookeeper SASL authentication
zookeeper.set.acl=true

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# The delay in milliseconds to wait before performing the first rebalance
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000

# Maximum allowed session timeout for registered consumers
group.max.session.timeout.ms=1800000

# Minimum allowed session timeout for registered consumers
group.min.session.timeout.ms=6000

############################# Controlled Shutdown #############################

# Enable controlled shutdown of the server
controlled.shutdown.enable=true

# Max retries for controlled shutdown
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3

# Backoff time between controlled shutdown retries
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

############################# Request Processing #############################

# Maximum time a request will wait in the queue before giving an error
request.timeout.ms=30000

# Maximum number of connections allowed per broker
max.connections=2147483647

# Maximum time to wait for background threads to exit during shutdown
background.threads=10

############################# Metrics & Monitoring #############################

# Enable JMX reporting
# JMX port is typically set via KAFKA_JMX_OPTS environment variable

# List of metrics reporter classes
metric.reporters=

# Number of samples maintained to compute metrics
metrics.num.samples=2

# The window of time a metrics sample is computed over
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000

# Recording level for metrics: INFO or DEBUG
metrics.recording.level=INFO

############################# Quota Configuration #############################

# Default quota for producer bytes per second per client-id
# Uncomment and set as needed
#quota.producer.default=10485760

# Default quota for consumer bytes per second per client-id
#quota.consumer.default=10485760

############################# Rack Awareness #############################

# Rack of the broker. This will be used in rack aware replication assignment
# Set this to the availability zone or rack identifier
broker.rack=us-east-1a

############################# KRaft Migration Support #############################

# Uncomment the following if planning a migration from ZooKeeper to KRaft mode
#process.roles=
#node.id=1
#controller.quorum.voters=
#controller.listener.names=CONTROLLER
